summary:
By using hearted., you agree to these terms. The basics:

You need a Google account to use the service
The service helps you explore your music — it doesn't guarantee perfect results
Song packs and subscriptions cost money; refunds aren't provided for used purchases
Don't abuse the service or use it to harm others
Your account can be terminated for violating these terms

items: A valid Google account is required
You must be at least 13 years old (or the minimum age in your country)
One account per person — no shared or automated accounts

content.text: hearted. analyzes your liked songs using language models (AI) and suggests which playlists they might fit. The analyses are interpretations, not definitive truths. Music is personal — take the suggestions as starting points, not answers.

items: Guarantee accuracy of any analysis
Modify your Spotify library without your explicit action
Store your Spotify password
15 songs unlocked automatically after completing onboarding
Only music analysis and playlist matching are available
Song packs are purchased through the platform
Prices are displayed before purchase
Songs unlocked by a pack never expire
25 of your most recent liked songs are ready immediately; remaining songs are explored as you choose them
By purchasing, you consent to immediate delivery and waive your 14-day withdrawal right
All pack purchases are final — no refunds
Can be cancelled anytime
No refunds for the current billing period; access continues until period ends

content.text: Prices may change. Existing credit balances remain valid. Subscription prices are locked for the current billing period.

items: Use automated tools to access the service
Use the service to harass, spam, or harm others
Use the service for personal music exploration
Report bugs or issues encountered
Respect other users if community features are added

items.description: Your Spotify library remains yours. hearted. accesses it with your permission but doesn't claim ownership.
hearted. is provided as-is, without warranties of any kind. There's no guarantee the service will be available, accurate, or error-free.
Song analyses are AI-generated interpretations. They may be wrong, incomplete, or miss nuance. Use your own judgment.
hearted. depends on Spotify (for library access), Google (for sign-in and AI), and other third-party services. If those change or become unavailable, hearted. functionality may be affected.

content.text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, hearted. isn't liable for:

items: Indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
Loss of data, profits, or goodwill
Service interruptions or errors

content.text: Total liability is limited to the amount paid for the service in the past 12 months.

items.description: Delete your account anytime. Personal data is removed per the Privacy Policy.
Accounts may be suspended or terminated for: Violating these terms, Abusing the service, Non-payment (for subscription accounts)

content.text: If an account is terminated for violations, remaining songs to explore and any active subscription may be forfeited.
Terms may be updated. Significant changes will be communicated via email before taking effect. Continued use after changes means acceptance of the new terms.
These terms are governed by the laws of Portugal. Disputes will be resolved in the courts of Lisbon.
Questions about these terms? Reach out: __EMAIL__
